prompt:
A mature hydroponic lettuce head with dense layered leaves growing from a net cup or raft opening above a nutrient reservoir. The plant should look crisp, full, and ready for cut-and-come-again harvesting, with subtle greenhouse or indoor growing context that clearly distinguishes it from soil-grown lettuce.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a bright near-future hydroponics aesthetic: soft diffuse lighting, realistic leaf texture and gentle moisture highlights, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the lettuce centered and uncluttered so it reads clearly as a DSPACE hydroponic crop icon.
